description: Verified header links and routes on mobile viewport. Found that the brand link text is 'Oskar Site' instead of 'okwasniewski', the 'Home' link text is missing, and the navigation links are lowercase instead of capitalized. Routes are correct for all 5 links.

issues.name: Brand text mismatch in header
issues.description: Expected: The brand link should be named "Home" or "okwasniewski" as per the requirement. Actual: The brand link text is "Oskar Site" and it is not named "Home" or "okwasniewski".
reproductionSteps: Check the brand link text in the header
issues.expectedBehavior: The brand link should be named "Home" or "okwasniewski" as per the requirement.
issues.actualBehavior: The brand link text is "Oskar Site" and it is not named "Home" or "okwasniewski".

issues.name: Link capitalization mismatch in header
issues.description: Expected: The links should be capitalized as per the requirement: "Blog", "Portfolio", "Videos", "Contact". Actual: The links in the header are lowercase: "blog", "portfolio", "videos", "contact".
reproductionSteps: Check the navigation links in the header
issues.expectedBehavior: The links should be capitalized as per the requirement: "Blog", "Portfolio", "Videos", "Contact".
issues.actualBehavior: The links in the header are lowercase: "blog", "portfolio", "videos", "contact".

issues.name: Home link missing in header
issues.description: Expected: The header should contain a "Home" link. Actual: The header contains 5 links: "Oskar Site", "blog", "portfolio", "videos", "contact". There is no link named "Home".
reproductionSteps: Check the navigation links in the header for "Home" link.
issues.expectedBehavior: The header should contain a "Home" link.
issues.actualBehavior: The header contains 5 links: "Oskar Site", "blog", "portfolio", "videos", "contact". There is no link named "Home".
